title: inula britannica var. linariifolia
intro: Inula britannica var. linariifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Elecampane, is a variety of the Elecampane plant, a flowering perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The Narrow-leaved Elecampane has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, and has been traditionally used to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
